subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I supplicate unto Thy most exalted Horizon, O Thou Who decreeth whatsoever Thou willest and sustaineth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اتضرع الى افقک الاعلى یا من تحکم ما تشاء و تؤی
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
